mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_suspend_d (ts_code, trade_date, susp_reason, resump_date) VALUES
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.suspReason}, #{item.resumpDate})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM stock_suspend_d WHERE (ts_code, trade_date) IN
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.tradeDate})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_suspend_d WHERE resump_date IS NOT NULL AND resump_date != '' AND trade_date > resump_date

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_suspend_d a WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM stock_suspend_d b WHERE b.ts_code = a.ts_code AND b.trade_date < a.trade_date AND (b.resump_date IS NULL OR b.resump_date = '' OR b.resump_date >= a.trade_date) )
